intro: Welcome to Pebbles and Petals Pre-School, a vibrant and nurturing early learning center dedicated to giving young children a joyful, enriching foundation for lifelong learning.
storyTagline: Where Little Dreams Begin and Bright Futures Bloom
storyText: Established in 2026 near Heritage Bagh, Kishtwar, Pebbles and Petals Pre-School is a vibrant, nurturing early learning center built to inspire curiosity, creativity, confidence and a lifelong love of exploration in every child.
mission: Provide a safe, caring, and inclusive learning environment.
Foster creativity, curiosity, and critical thinking through play-based learning.
Encourage social, emotional, physical, and cognitive development.
Build strong partnerships with parents in supporting each child's growth.
Instill values of kindness, respect, responsibility, and independence.
philosophy: We believe children learn best through play, exploration, and hands-on experiences. Our curriculum blends meaningful activities with fun — developing life skills, communication, problem-solving, and emotional intelligence while children enjoy every step of the journey.
whyChoose: Emphasis on values and character building
